name: @assistrio/chat-widget
description: Standalone Assistrio embeddable chat widget (assistrio-chat.js / assistrio-chat.css)

scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run copy:public
scripts.copy:public: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('dist/assistrio-chat.js','public/assistrio-chat.js'); fs.copyFileSync('dist/assistrio-chat.css','public/assistrio-chat.css'); console.log('Copied dist files to public/');"
